mapper.sql: member_id ,login_id ,enc_passwd ,passwd_dt ,passwd_init ,member_nm ,nickname ,gender ,authority_id ,fn_cmm_get_authority_nm(authority_id) as authority_nm ,member_st ,fn_cmm_get_code_nm('MEMBER_ST', member_st) as member_st_nm ,member_st_dt ,black_list_begin_day ,black_list_end_day ,black_list_reason ,member_type ,fn_cmm_get_code_nm('MEMBER_TYPE', member_type) as member_type_nm ,ci ,enc_email ,enc_birthday ,enc_mobile_no ,charger_nm ,ceo_nm ,bizrno ,jurirno ,instr ,marketing_reception ,refresh_token ,kakao_token ,naver_token ,google_token ,last_login_dt ,creator_id ,created_dt ,updater_id ,updated_dt
mapper.select: /** CmmtMemberDao.selectCount */ select count(login_id) as cnt from cmmt_member where

/** CmmtMemberDao.selectCurrStats */ select current_timestamp as crtr_dt , sum(case when member_st = 'SECESSION' then 0 else 1 end) as crtr_total_mbr_cnt /** 탈퇴자는 회원에서 제외해야 ... */ , sum(case when member_st = 'SECESSION' then 1 else 0 end) as crtr_secession_mbr_cnt , sum(case when member_st = 'DORMANT' then 1 else 0 end) as crtr_dormant_mbr_cnt , sum(case when member_st = 'BLACK' then 1 else 0 end) as crtr_black_mbr_cnt , sum(case when member_st = 'NORMAL' then 1 else 0 end) as crtr_normal_mbr_cnt from cmmt_member

/** CmmtMemberDao.selectMe */ select member_id ,login_id ,member_nm ,nickname ,gender ,member_type ,enc_email ,enc_birthday ,enc_mobile_no ,charger_nm ,ceo_nm ,bizrno ,jurirno ,instr ,marketing_reception ,last_login_dt from cmmt_member where member_id = #{memberId}
